subject: Please submit competitor analysis report by Friday
body: Hi team, please complete the latest analysis report on Competitor A and Competitor B by this Friday. Key focus areas: 1. The threat posed by Competitor A's new version to us 2. Competitor B's market strategy after funding 3. Our recommended responses. Send the report to management.

subject: Client mentioned Competitor A's AI features
body: During today's visit to Wantong Logistics, Director Zhao mentioned that Competitor A just released an AI assistant feature and asked when we would have something similar. I replied that it's in planning. Please include a focused analysis of this competitive threat in the report.
